'''Zraii''' was a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] who was in charge of repairs and maintenance for [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] fleet of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], as well as other [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] ships. He also [[Memory wipe/Legends|mind wiped]] and upgraded [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' droid, [[R5-G8/Legends|R5-D2]] (commonly known as Mynock), turning it into an [[R5-G8/Legends|R5-G8]] named Gate. He narrowly escaped the destruction of [[Noquivzor]] at Warlord [[Zsinj]]'s hands.<ref name="X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>
